content:
# Iter-014 → next-plan recommendations

## CRITICAL — restore `SliceTransport.lean` to GREEN
- The file is **RED**: committed `right_inv` exposing steps **elaborator-timeout L919** + whnf-timeout
  L632. `left_inv` is genuinely fixed (the L890 spurious-rw deletion, verified green).
- The blocker was an **import-race**: SliceTransport imports `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`, which the D3′
  lane left RED all session, so `right_inv` was committed blind. **`TensorObjSubstrate.lean` is now
  GREEN**, so the next DUAL prover gets live feedback.
- ACTION (DUAL prover): re-build first; either lighten the `right_inv` exposing block so it elaborates,
  or revert `right_inv` to a bare `sorry`. Then **drop in the fully-derived 3-step cancellation** from
  `task_results/…SliceTransport.lean.md` (§"Complete remaining proof — VERIFIED ON PAPER"):
  (1) ring identity `hcomp` via `appIso_inv_naturality` + `Functor.map_eqToHom` + `Iso.inv_hom_id`;
  (2) ψ-naturality `hψ` via `PresheafOfModules.naturality_apply` (mirror of `left_inv`'s `hφ`);
  (3) `Y.presheaf` round-trip `hmaps` (mirror of `left_inv`'s `hmaps`, on `Y` not `X`).
  Each step is a structural copy of an already-closed block in this same file. No new infra, no Mathlib gap.
- **DO NOT** re-add `rw [ModuleCat.restrictScalars.map_apply]` (the L890 bug — does not match; use defeq).
- **DO NOT commit unverified multi-line tactic blocks** on this file again. If the dep is RED, revert to
  bare `sorry` rather than shipping blind — this is the 2nd green→red regression from this exact pattern
  (iter-013, iter-014).

## HIGH — D3′ `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` step (i): PIVOT to a structural refactor (do NOT retry tactics)
- The ESCALATION condition is **MET** and confirmed by build. **Do NOT assign another prover
  helper-layer round** — four concrete tactic routes (`rw [h1]`, `erw [h1]`+flatten, fused `hmain`,
  single-instance `hDE`) all fail at the SAME wall: composing the `mateEquiv`/`leftAdjointUniq`
  `.app`-components yields a non-canonical `CategoryStruct.comp`; `Category.assoc` can't key-match it and
  `erw` whnf-bombs (3.2M hb) crossing it.
- The previously-blamed `Scheme.Modules`-vs-`SheafOfModules` instance clash is **resolved** (iter-014
  refactor landed, verified in trace). The new root cause is the mate-`whnf` of the `.app`-components.
- ACTION (plan): dispatch the **`refactor`** subagent to re-derive the S1 composition coherence at the
  **NatTrans level** — the file already has `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_natTrans` (L2469). Goal:
  compose `R0/R1/R5/D/E` as NatTrans (where the composite is canonical) and only THEN take `.app`, so
  `D ≫ E` is adjacent without per-`.app` mate-whnf. Alternative: expose a `SheafOfModules.instCategory`-
  canonical reassociation of the `mateEquiv` components.
- Once `D ≫ E` is adjacent: `rw [Category.assoc, sheafifyMap_pullbackComp_hom_inv_id, Category.comp_id]`
  closes (i); then (ii) `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_δ` split of `δcomp`; (iii) Sq3 `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp`
  / Sq4 `pullbackValIso_comp` interleave.

## Sequencing note (avoid the import-race that caused the regression)
- The two lanes share a dependency edge (SliceTransport imports TensorObjSubstrate). When D3′ is
  mid-refactor and likely to leave TensorObjSubstrate RED, **do not run the DUAL prover concurrently** —
  it cannot verify and will ship blind. Either (a) sequence DUAL after D3′ lands green this iter, or
  (b) give DUAL an explicit "if dep RED, leave right_inv as bare sorry; do not commit live tactics" guard.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as-is
- D3′ step (i) by any `rw`/`simp`/`erw [Category.assoc]` tactic route on the `.app`-level goal: confirmed
  dead-end (4 routes, this iter). Only a NatTrans-level refactor unblocks it.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered
- **Strip a `restrictScalars` functor wrapper by defeq** (`erw`/`show`), not `restrictScalars.map_apply`
  (pattern-fragile). DUAL `left_inv` L890.
- **Reassociate mate-morphism composites at the NatTrans level, never at `.app` level** — `.app` of a
  `mateEquiv` composite is a non-canonical comp; `Category.assoc` fails and `erw` whnf-bombs.
- **`erw [h1]` (not `rw`)** to splice a lemma whose RHS pretty-prints identically to the goal but carries
  a hidden defeq instance.

## Coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = **97** `lean_aux` nodes (unchanged; no new decls this iter). Defer to
  the scheduled Coverage + file-split phase; no new delta entries needed this iter.
